name: Huneed Technologies
summary: Huneed Technologies develops, manufactures, and sells airborne and defense communication systems in Korea. It offers military communication equipment, including high capacity trunk radio systems, high speed wireless transmission equipment, and remote detonation devices; and command and control systems, such as weapons control systems, as well as tactical data link processing systems. The company also provides airborne systems comprising electrical panel assemblies and light civil helicopter electrical systems, as well as electronics manufacturing services for flight control computers, missile warning receivers, and master warning panel and caution warning panels; and ground control systems, which include ground system development and air traffic flow management systems. In addition, it offers commercial IT systems and logistics support services. The company was formerly known as Daeyoung Electronics Industrial Co., Ltd and changed its name to Huneed Technologies in March 2000. Huneed Technologies was founded in 1968 and is based in Incheon, South Korea.
